commit.message:
feat: auto-update option for LXC installations

Add AUTO_UPDATE config toggle (off by default). When enabled on
LXC/systemd, the hourly update checker automatically runs upgrade.sh
after detecting a new version — no manual action needed.

- New config key AUTO_UPDATE in DEFAULT_CONFIG and allowed_keys
- Toggle in web UI under Updates section (standalone only)
- _should_auto_update() checks config + runtime (LXC only, not Docker/HA)
- _auto_apply_update() runs upgrade.sh in executor with 120s timeout
- /api/update/info returns auto_update status

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
Upgrade notebook to comprehensive 15-section research framework

Expand linear_attention_vit.ipynb from 10 to 15 sections (22→32 cells):

Section 4 - Model Architectures (updated):
- Add LayerScale (CaiT-style per-channel scaling, init=1e-4)
- Add apply_rope() for Rotary Positional Embeddings on Q/K tensors
- Add TokenPruner for learned inference-time token pruning
- Add RelativePositionBias (2D learnable relative position bias table)
- Update XCiTBlock to use LayerScale (ls1/ls2/ls3) in all sub-paths

Section 5 - Self-Supervised Pretraining Models (new):
- XCABlock: XCA+MLP block without LPI for flexible token counts
- MAEPretrainer: Masked Autoencoder (He et al. CVPR 2022)
- MAEv2Pretrainer: Feature distillation with EMA teacher encoder
- SimMIMPretrainer: Simple Masked Image Modeling (Xie et al. CVPR 2022)

Section 6 - Training Utilities (updated):
- Add UncertaintyWeightedLoss (Kendall et al.) with learnable log-sigma params
- Add EXPERIMENT_LOG_TEMPLATE structured logging dict
- Add run_experiment_uw() pipeline with pretrained weight loading support

Section 8 - Visualization Tools (updated):
- Add visualize_attention_maps() with XCA forward hook

Sections 9-13 - Experiments (new):
- Section 9: SimMIM pretraining, saves encoder to tempfile
- Section 10: Fine-tune pretrained LinearAttentionViT + UW-Loss
- Section 11: Train LinearAttentionViT from scratch + UW-Loss
- Section 12: Train StandardViT
- Section 13: Train HybridCNNViT

Sections 14-15 - Benchmark + Results (updated):
- 5-model comparison table with attention map visualization
- Pretraining benefit quantification

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

Expand notebook to 15 sections with SSL pretraining and modern attention

- Add Section 5: Self-supervised pretraining models (MAEPretrainer,
  MAEv2Pretrainer, SimMIMPretrainer) using XCA-based encoder
- Add LayerScale, apply_rope (RoPE), TokenPruner, RelativePositionBias
  to Section 4 model architectures
- Update XCiTBlock to use LayerScale (ls1, ls2, ls3) for stability
- Add UncertaintyWeightedLoss (Kendall et al.) and run_experiment_uw
  to Section 6 training utilities
- Add visualize_attention_maps() with forward hook to Section 8
- Add Section 9: SimMIM pretraining experiment
- Add Section 10: Fine-tune pretrained LinearAttentionViT
- Add Section 11: LinearAttentionViT from scratch (baseline)
- Add Section 12: Standard ViT training
- Add Section 13: Hybrid CNN+ViT training
- Update Section 14: 5-model benchmark comparison with scatter plots,
  bar charts, and attention map visualization
- Update Section 15: Final results with pretraining benefit analysis
- Fix EarlyStopping to support __call__ interface

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
fix(ha-addon): AppArmor enforce with blanket file/signal rules

Modeled after Music Assistant addon profile. Granular path rules
are unreliable on Docker overlayfs — use blanket file/signal access
and restrict via capabilities and network rules instead.

Also adds cd /app to entrypoint.sh for S6 cwd compatibility.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
fix: add cd /app to entrypoint.sh for S6 cwd compatibility

S6 with-contenv may reset cwd even when the run script does cd /app.
Making entrypoint.sh self-contained ensures it always runs from /app
regardless of how it's invoked.

commit.message:
fix(ha-addon): AppArmor enforce mode — rix for scripts, signal rules

Key fixes:
- ix → rix for /init, /s6-init, /bin/**, /usr/bin/**, /package/**,
  /command/** — shell scripts need read for shebang parsing
- Added signal (send) rule for S6 process management
- Added /dev/tty rw, /run/{,**} rwk, /etc/cont-finish.d/**
- /app/** rixm — allow memory-mapped Python .pyc files
- /tmp/** rwk — lock files need k (lock)
- Removed complain flag — profile is now in enforce mode
- Simplified /s6-init: removed runtime chmod (set at build time)

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
fix: add /s6-init wrapper to fix /init permission denied on restart

Docker overlayfs can strip execute permissions from /init on
container restart. The /s6-init wrapper re-applies chmod +x
before exec-ing /init.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
fix: ensure /init has execute permission after S6 extraction

Buildx layer cache can strip file permissions on extracted S6
binaries. Explicit chmod +x /init ensures the entrypoint is
always executable.

commit.message:
fix: set cwd=/app for S6 service and subprocess spawn

S6 overlay starts services with cwd=/ which caused:
- 'vunknown' in diagnostics (config.py import failed)
- ModuleNotFoundError for services.daemon_process subprocess

Fix: cd /app in S6 run script + explicit cwd in create_subprocess_exec.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
feat(ha-addon): add S6 overlay process supervision and enable AppArmor

- Install S6 overlay v3.2.0.2 in main Dockerfile (multi-arch: amd64/arm64/armv7)
- Add rootfs/ with sendspin longrun service (run, finish, type)
- Change ENTRYPOINT from /app/entrypoint.sh to /init (S6 manages lifecycle)
- Simplify ha-addon/Dockerfile to thin wrapper (no more run.sh copy)
- Enable AppArmor in complain mode for safe initial testing
- Set init: false in config.yaml (S6 is in image, not injected by Supervisor)
- Add S6 env vars: S6_KEEP_ENV, S6_BEHAVIOUR_IF_STAGE2_FAILS, S6_CMD_WAIT_FOR_SERVICES_MAXTIME
- Add /var/run/s6/** rwk rule to AppArmor profile

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
Remove unused tensorflow from requirements.txt (#167)

TensorFlow was never imported by project code — only listed as a
dependency. It caused noisy startup warnings (oneDNN, CPU flags, absl
logging) on every process launch. TensorBoard (used via PyTorch's
SummaryWriter) does not require TensorFlow.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
Move PayrollOverride & OverrideRequest to Cuti & Izin group

These attendance correction/override items are logically grouped
with leave requests under 'Cuti & Izin'. Visible to all roles (owner, hr).
Renamed group from 'Cuti' to 'Cuti & Izin' across all resources.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

Simplify admin panel navigation for owners

Consolidate 7+ confusing groups into 5 clean groups:
- Karyawan: Employees, Leave Balance, Employee Compensation
- Kehadiran: Attendance Record, Requests, Decision
- Cuti: Leave Requests
- Penggajian: PayrollBatch, Period, Row, Addition
- Pengaturan (collapsed by default): all config items

Hide technical items from owner/hr via shouldRegisterNavigation():
- PayrollOverrideResource (super_admin only)
- OverrideRequestResource (super_admin only)
- UserDeviceResource (super_admin only)

CompanyResource was already super_admin only.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

Update tests to reflect new open_method API

- Replace geometry='grid' with open_method='dataset' in all matchup/open calls
- Replace geometry='swath' with open_method='datatree-merge' (+ spatial_method='xoak') in matchup calls
- Remove geometry arg from plan.show_variables() calls entirely
- Replace TestGeometryParameter with TestOpenMethodParameter
- Replace TestGeometryEnforcement with TestSpatialCompatCheck using _check_spatial_compat
- Remove test_accepts_geometry from TestMatchupSignature in test_api.py
- Remove test_open_dataset_invalid_geometry_raises from TestPlanOpenDataset
- Update test_grid_geometry_with_2d_data_raises to test_nearest_with_2d_data_raises
- Update TestMissingVariableErrorMessage to check open_method= not geometry=
- Update TestMissingXoak to not pass geometry= arg
- Update TestXoakSpatialMethod docstring and open_method args
- Rename test methods to reflect new API naming

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
Replace notebook with comprehensive 10-section Linear Attention ViT benchmark

- Section 1: Configuration (hyperparameters, device detection, seeding)
- Section 2: Dataset Loading (lazy HDF5 + synthetic fallback)
- Section 3: Data Preprocessing & Augmentation (physics-inspired transforms)
- Section 4: Model Architectures (StandardViT, LinearAttentionViT/XCA, HybridCNNViT)
- Section 5: Training Utilities (AMP, gradient clipping, early stopping)
- Section 6: Evaluation Metrics (accuracy, F1, MSE, MAE, R²)
- Section 7: Visualization Tools (curves, scatter, confusion matrix)
- Section 8: Experiments (full training pipeline for all 3 models)
- Section 9: Benchmark Comparison (summary table + comparison plots)
- Section 10: Final Results & Analysis & Discussion

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
feat: PWA offline support + class resource tracking

- Full PWA offline support with IndexedDB persistence, offline mutation
  queue, and LWW sync-on-reconnect via syncEngine
- OfflineBanner and InstallPromptBanner components
- NetworkFirst service worker strategy for all /api/* routes
- Zustand character store persisted across sessions
- LAN access: Vite host:true, expanded CORS origins

- ClassResourceEntity, DTOs, migration (AddClassResources)
- ClassResourceSeedService: auto-computes resources per class/level
  (Channel Divinity, Ki Points, Rage, Sorcery Points, Action Surge,
  Second Wind, Bardic Inspiration, Lay on Hands, Pact Magic, etc.)
- ClassResourcesController: use/restore/long-rest/short-rest/sync
- resource_key added to 23 class features in seed JSON
- Frontend: ClassResource type, classResources API module
- StatsPage: Class Resources tracker replaces class features section
  (pip dots, HP pools, sub-options for Channel Divinity choices)
- FeaturesPage: dedicated page for class features + racial traits
- CharacterOverviewPage: Features tile added to nav
- SpellsPerDayPage: Long Rest also resets class resources

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>
